homepage_optimization_suggestions.suggestion: Fill required category attributes, schema-required fields, and media candidates before handing the draft package to manual review. Do not enter platform publish.
homepage_optimization_suggestions.basis: Task 3 still stays at safe draft preparation and manual field completion.

homepage_optimization_suggestions.suggestion: 首页模块优化建议当前只能基于产品与经营表现做保守判断，无法按来源流量或国家来源精细化调优。

media_optimization_suggestions.suggestion: 主图、详情图与媒体素材优先跟随当前诊断问题清单整改，先处理高流量低反馈商品。
media_optimization_suggestions.basis: product diagnostic 已给出内容侧问题信号。
evidence: problem_map identifies concrete quality gaps in the sampled products.
Product detail sampling exposes content completeness and recency signals.
Group/category sampling exposes structure coverage and ungrouped items.

media_optimization_suggestions.suggestion: 当前产品 summary 仍有 sample/cap 边界，媒体优化建议应先从已纳入样本的重点产品开始。

new_product_direction_suggestions.suggestion: 新品建议当前只能基于已上线商品表现、关键词信号与现有工作台 readiness 做保守扩展，不能伪装成完整选品模型。
new_product_direction_suggestions.basis: 当前没有新的选品专用 official field，必须沿用既有经营与内容信号。

new_product_direction_suggestions.suggestion: 由于缺少国家来源维度，新品方向建议暂时不能按国家市场精细拆分，只能做全局保守建议。
